description_long: This is a sleek, white Audi TT coupe car with a sporty, aerodynamic design and a low, streamlined profile. The car features two doors, a prominent rear spoiler, and alloy wheels, emphasizing its performance-oriented character. The front grille is distinctively Audi, with the brand's logo clearly visible, and the headlights are sharply contoured. The side windows are frameless, contributing to the coupe's modern and elegant appearance. Subtle branding and sponsor decals are present on the doors and hood, adding to its urban and promotional appeal. The rear of the car is characterized by a compact trunk, dual exhausts, and stylish taillights.
description: A white Audi TT coupe with two doors, sporty lines, alloy wheels, and a rear spoiler, featuring distinct Audi branding and sponsor decals.
description_view_0: Front three-quarter view showing the Audi grille, headlights, hood decals, and left side profile.
description_view_1: Rear three-quarter view highlighting the taillights, rear spoiler, trunk, and right side profile.
description_view_2: Rear side view focusing on the right door, rear fender, and visible sponsor decals.
description_view_3: Front side view emphasizing the grille, headlights, front bumper, and left door.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
